'''Gulek Lohn''' was a green [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], who worked on [[Darknon Station]]. There he managed the [[Stormview Lounge]]. Lohn was frequently to be found behind the bar, keeping an eye on his patrons in case he recognized any of them as criminals with [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on their heads.

{{Char-stub}}
